title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Forever 21 India South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Forever 21 India South Asia Partners:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India South Asia Partners!
